# Yowa Innovations

> Yowa Innovations is a creative agency in Kampala, Uganda, delivering content creation, video production, photography and digital marketing for NGOs, corporates and startups across East Africa.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, work and impact stories.
- [About](/about): Mission, values and the team behind Yowa Innovations.
- [Projects](/projects): Portfolio of completed videos, documentaries and campaigns.
- [Blog](/blogs): Insights on innovation, sustainability and impact in East Africa.
- [Shop](/shop): eBooks, video packs, photo collections and film scripts.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles and how to join the team.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch about a project or partnership.
- [Get Started](/get-started): Brief us on your project and request a quote.
- [Team](/team): Meet our supporting team of employees, freelancers and trainees.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service)
- [Cookie Policy](/cookie-policy)
- [Content Policy](/content-policy)
